title: Age Of Dragons
description: A minecraft dark fantasy RPG mod focussed on bossfights, dimensions, classes and adventure. Bringing the soulslike expierience to minecraft.
body:
A Dark Fantasy Minecraft ModThis mod is still work in progress and will be updated in the future 

IMPORTANT FOR 1.1 VERSION!!! THIS MOD REQUIRES THE PHOTON AND CURIOS MOD AND MCREATOR LINK

PHOTON: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/photon

CURIOS: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios

MCREATOR LINK: https://mcreator.net/download/link

 

VFX EFFECTS WILL ONLY WORK IF THE ldlib2 FOLDER OF PHOTON IS REPLACED!!!

> VFX DOWNLOAD: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1lf5pJ7HyXx3L8lQEYf1_Y782Q8Y2FQhS/view?usp=sharing

Trailer: https://youtu.be/tppLsxc0kjM?si=nb75nRL3wrXPDGTd

Age of Dragons is a large-scale dark fantasy mod focused on dragons, ancient kings, forgotten dimensions, and the price of power.

The world is changing.

Dragons of many elements now roam the lands — Fire, Ice, Storm, Earth, Light, and Darkness — each bound to a deeper force older than the world itself.
Some may be summoned.
Others must be challenged.

Your journey is shaped by ancient trials known as the Proves:

Prove of Will – face corrupted beings of decay and nature

Prove of Justice – confront fallen guardians of law and loyalty

Prove of Wisdom – challenge ancient queens and broodmothers

Prove of Strength – stand before the Eight Kings

Only those who endure may walk the path toward the Dragonlands.

8 Dragon Elements with rarity tiers from Common to Legendary

Epic and Legendary Dragons act as natural disasters

Face powerful enemies including:

The Rune Golem, an ancient judge of justice

Alicia, the Storm, a fallen sentinel of the skies

Broodmothers, cursed entities, queens, and forgotten kings

Each boss features multiple phases, custom animations, AI-generated music, and cinematic attacks. 

This mod is designed for challenging gameplay

Progression is intentional and structured

Some bosses are immune to certain damage types

Preparation matters

Next Major Update
Update: The Thorned Kingdom
This update expands the world of Age of Dragons with stronger dragons, the first true Dragonland dimension, and the tragic rise of Kyros.

All Rare Dragons added and fully integrated

First of the Eight Kings

Multi-phase cinematic boss fight

Faerie Dragon Queen

Multi-phase fight with cinematic attacks

     Required for Prove of Wisdom

The first Dimension

     ambient mobs

     structures

      minibosses

Epic Earth Dragon Boss

Legendary Earth Dragon Boss

 

 CHECK OUT THE WIKI: https://www.minecraft-guides.com/mod/age-of-dragons/
